news.t: UPDATE -- Tidal Financial Group and Defiance ETFs Announce Reverse Stock Splits for Select ETFs
Tidal Financial Group and Defiance ETFs Announce Reverse Stock Splits for Select ETFs
Defiance Launches RGTX: 2X Leveraged ETF for Rigetti Computing, Inc.

holdings.infoBox: RGTX is an equity ETF with a total of 13 individual holdings.

overview.description: The Defiance Daily Target 2X Long RGTI ETF (RGTX) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in information technology equity. The fund seeks to deliver 2x leveraged exposure to the daily share price movement of Rigetti Computing (RGTI), less fees and expenses, through derivatives like swap agreements. RGTX was launched on Mar 31, 2025 and is issued by Defiance.
